cases.name: 1. tenant A getWorkflowCandidates returns only tenant A
2. tenant A excludes tenant B candidates
4. tenant B getWorkflowCandidates returns only tenant B
5. tenant A getWorkflowStats counts only tenant A
6. tenant B getWorkflowStats counts only tenant B
7. tenant A board view counts only tenant A subjects in columns
8. concurrent ALS frames stay isolated for getWorkflowCandidates
10. workflow CONFIG (getWorkflow) remains global — tenant A sees the global workflow id
11. mutation paths deferred (createWorkflow still uses pilot.prisma; no separate mutation pilot yet)
12. audit emission deferred (auditLog.create stays on pilot.prisma; no TenantAuditLogService routing yet)
